title: 🧪 Applications of Divide and Conquer - Finding of power of an element with its Implementation
content:
```python
## Finding of power of an element when n >= 1
## Assignment task: n <= 0
## Time complexity : O(logn)
## function definition
def findPowerOfElement(a,n):
    ## small problem
    ## if n < 0:
    ## if n == 0:
    if n == 1:
        return a
    else:
        ## big problem -> Divide and Conquer Approach
        mid = n // 2
        ## recursive call
        b = findPowerOfElement(a,mid)
        result = b * b
        #even
        if n % 2 == 0:
            return result
        return result * a

## Driver code
## n = -4
a = 2
n = 12
## function calling
result = findPowerOfElement(a,n)
print("The power of an element is:", result)
```
